mainEntity.name: What is the most profitable crop in Farming Simulator 25?

acceptedAnswer.text: Soybeans: ~3,800-4,500€/ha profit. Sugarcane and Cotton have high per-cycle income but require expensive equipment. Potatoes and Sugar Beets are root crops with high yield but slower harvesting. For year-round operations, consider rotating Soybeans → Canola → Wheat.

mainEntity.name: Should I buy fields or lease equipment first in FS25?

acceptedAnswer.text: Lease equipment (especially harvesters) in early game — save capital for buying fields. Start with medium-sized fields (2-5ha), use AI workers for fieldwork, and reinvest profits into land. Own your tractor and seeder, lease the harvester.
